name: Features Grid
description: A responsive grid layout for showcasing product features or services. Each feature card includes an icon, title, and description with hover effects and optional animations.
whenToUse: Use to display a set of features, services, or benefits in a visually organized grid. Works well below the hero section.

props.name: features
props.description: Array of feature objects with icon, title, and description

props.name: columns
props.description: Number of columns in the grid layout

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style variant for feature items

props.name: animated
props.description: Whether to animate features on scroll into view
